* fix: exclude cost-optimization from policy sync to fix validation

the configMap.key field with additionalProperties: false, causing
kubeconform to fail on the synced schedule-based-quotas sample. Since
this is a schema bug and the sample is not deployed, exclude the
cost-optimization category from sync and remove the existing file.

* Fix CFG predict_step receiving batch_idx as guidance_scale (#53)

* Initial plan

* Fix CFG predict_step signature conflict with PyTorch Lightning

Both CFG models had predict_step(self, batch, guidance_scale=None) which
caused PyTorch Lightning to pass batch_idx as guidance_scale, silently
overriding the guidance scale set on the model. This resulted in:
- Wrong guidance scales being used during evaluation
- Nearly identical scores across different guidance strengths
- Worse scores compared to non-CFG models

Fix: Changed signature to predict_step(self, batch, batch_idx=None) and
read guidance_scale from self.guidance_scale attribute instead.

* Add permutation_importance_drn.py for DRN/EMOS models with copula postprocessing

DRN/EMOS models output distribution parameters (mu, sigma) rather than
samples directly. This script extends permutation importance to handle
the extra copula step:

1. Load model + data, run baseline forward pass
2. Convert distributional params to forecast samples via ECC or GCA
3. Compute baseline energy score on the copula samples
4. For each channel: inject PermuteChannel → forward pass → copula → ES
5. Record (ES_permuted - ES_baseline) / ES_baseline

CLI: python -m genpp.eval.permutation_importance_drn \
       --run-path feik/genpp/m5y9kwlh --split val --copula ecc -v

Reuses helpers from copulas_eval.py (stack_predictions,
predictions_to_dataarray, do_ecc, do_gca) and permutation_importance.py
(_build_x_transform, _get_channel_info, parse_device, log_msg).

Co-authored-by: m-j-w-f <98650214+m-j-w-f@users.noreply.github.com>

* Add parallel launcher for DRN permutation importance

Discovers all input channels from cached metadata, launches one
permutation_importance_drn.py subprocess per channel in parallel.
Each subprocess writes to a unique temp CSV to avoid write collisions.
Results are merged into a single sorted output file once all finish.

CLI: python -m genpp.eval.launch_permutation_importance_drn \
       --run-path feik/genpp/m5y9kwlh --max-parallel 4 --device 0 -v

Features:
- --max-parallel flag to limit concurrent subprocesses
- --channels to subset channels (forwarded to each subprocess)
- Per-channel temp files prevent write collisions
- Merged CSV sorted by importance descending

* Fix evaluation bugs: shuffle-safe dataloader, consistent spatial ordering, secure torch.load

Bug 1 (icon_predict_eval.py): Ground truth was collected by re-iterating the
dataloader AFTER trainer.predict() consumed it. This caused misalignment when
the train split's dataloader uses shuffle=True (different random order each
iteration). Fixed by creating a dedicated eval DataLoader with shuffle=False
and collecting ground truth before predictions.

Bug 2 (raw_ensemble.py): Spatial dimensions were transposed as [y, x] while
the dataset AXIS_ORDER uses [x, y]. Fixed to use consistent [x, y] ordering.

Bug 3 (dataset.py): torch.load calls lacked weights_only=True, which is a
security concern and produces deprecation warnings in PyTorch 2.x.

* Fix NaN in spatial normalization: clamp variance and std in _compute_tensor_stats

Two sources of NaN in spatial mode:
1. Negative variance from E[x²]-E[x]² numerical cancellation → sqrt(negative) = NaN
2. Zero std at constant grid cells → division by zero = Inf/NaN in __getitem__

Fix: clamp variance to min=0 before sqrt, clamp std to min=1e-6 in spatial mode.
This prevents NaN in norm_stats which was propagating to all_vars_mean and all_vars_std.

commit.message:
Fix item access type inference (#280)

* Infer element types for ItemAccessExpression

Previously myList{0} always returned Type.Any. Now inspects the collection
type and returns:
- DefinedList: union of element types
- DefinedTable: DefinedRecord matching table columns
- Plain List: AnyInstance (unknown elements)
- Plain Table: RecordInstance
- AnyUnion: recursively resolves from union members
- Optional access (?): same type but nullable

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Simplify nullable test assertion

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix 3 type inference bugs: range nullable, error type, null coalescing

B3: Range expression with nullable operands now returns List instead of None.
    Nullability is a runtime concern, not a type error.

B4: ErrorRaisingExpression now returns None instead of Any.
    Error expressions never produce a value  they always throw.

B5: Null coalescing (x ?? y) now strips nullability from left operand
    in the result union, since ?? guarantees non-null from left side.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Remove unnecessary Map copy in DefinedTable element type extraction

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Complete Metal.jl GPU acceleration

- Fix run_gpu! loop to follow exact 16-step CPU integration order
- Fix recovery duration: use lognormal (matching CPU default) instead of exponential
- Fix dynamic network support: re-generate edges each step (was using static cached edges)
- Add SEIR GPU support (exposed→infected transition, recovery time setting)
- Fix SIS GPU: use ti_recovered-based recovery, add immunity waning + boost
- Add cache_edges option for static network optimization
- Optimize results: GPU-side sum() instead of full state download
- GPUDiseaseArrays extended with exposed/ti_exposed fields
- Add _sample_recovery_durations helper matching CPU distribution
- Correctness verified: r>0.999 for SIR, SIS, SEIR (30 seeds)
- Update GPU vignette with actual benchmarks and working examples
- Extension now 1,696 lines (was 1,385)

commit.message:
Add Documenter.jl gh-pages workflow, untrack docs/build

- Add .github/workflows/docs.yml: builds and deploys docs on push to
  main and version tags using Documenter.jl + deploydocs()
- Remove docs/build/ and docs/Manifest.toml from tracking
- Add docs/build/ to .gitignore
- Add Documenter compat bound to docs/Project.toml

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: Starsim.jl
repository.description: Julia port of the Starsim agent-based disease modeling framework

commit.message:
feat: Add Gemini AI integration with rate limit handling

- Configure Gemini API (gemini-flash-latest model)
- Add python-dotenv for environment variable management
- Add rate limit retry logic with exponential backoff
- Make frontend API_BASE configurable via env variable
- Add .env.example templates for backend and frontend
- Fix server binding for localhost access

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: JSON-LD escaping in index.html, area filter consistency, legacy location handling

- Apply |tojson to all JSON-LD string values in index.html (matching
  job.html fix) to prevent XSS and SEO corruption
- Ignore area filter on server when no location is provided, keeping
  UI and server behavior consistent
- Gracefully handle legacy Job Openings with leaf locations: auto-migrate
  the leaf to custom_area and set location to its parent instead of
  throwing an error

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: add email configuration validation for Zeptomail override

Add after_migrate hook that validates email configuration:
- Checks for outgoing email path (mail_server or default Email Account)
- Validates Zeptomail settings (endpoint, API key, domain)
- Logs warnings without blocking migration

Site config updated with mail_server settings so Frappe's
fetch_smtp_server() succeeds before reaching the Zeptomail
override_email_send hook.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: location display format and area filter behavior

- Fix tojson crash on datetime by adding |string filter
- Change location format from 'Location → Area' to 'Area, Location'
- Hide area filter dropdown when no location is selected
- Applied to both job listing and job detail pages

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

CHEF-31158 Setup common config to block PR merges if trufflehog fails (#22)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: restrict location dropdown to parent locations only

- Add is_group=1 filter on location field in client script
- Add server-side validation rejecting non-parent locations
- Strengthen area validation to check parent relationship

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: apply Employee ID Format for all users including Administrator

- Restructure autoname() so ID format lookup runs for all users
- Keep Company Assignment permission check for non-admin only
- Administrator now uses configured per-company ID format

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: show complete location (area) on job detail page

- Display 'Location → Area' in header and sidebar
- Update JSON-LD schema with addressLocality/addressRegion
- Fix XSS: use |tojson for all JSON-LD interpolations
- Fix operator precedence: (custom_summary or description) | striptags

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add preview color attribute feature (#452)

* Support preview color to custom attributes

* Apply suggestion from @Copilot

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix code style

Change desktop grid from repeat(3, 1fr) to repeat(2, 1fr). With 4 cards
the old 3-column layout left the 4th card alone at bottom-left. A 2x2
grid is visually balanced and fills both rows evenly.

style(design): FINDING-RAINBOW — replace rainbow gradient with brand colors

Replace 8-stop rainbow gradient (pink→orange→gold→teal→blue→purple) with
